snapshot.notes: Back of legs sore from Monday's squats. Wanted more sleep.

readiness.reasoning: HRV +3.6 SD, RHR -3, no upper soreness (upper day). Energy moderate but everything else green. Full programming.

actual_exercises.name: Chest Press
actual_exercises.notes: PROGRESSED from 45 lb. Pretty easy all 3 sets. Bump to 55 next.

actual_exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
actual_exercises.notes: Set 1 at 60 felt easy, bumped to 75. BUT different bar/grip attachment — do NOT lock in 75. Retest at 65 with regular bar.

actual_exercises.name: Tricep Dip
actual_exercises.notes: PROGRESSED from 15 to 20 lb. Set 1 at 15 easy, bumped to 20. Lock in 20.

actual_exercises.name: Overhead Press
actual_exercises.notes: Hard. Dreaded set 3. Still the grinder. Hold until clean 3x10.

actual_exercises.name: Seated Row
actual_exercises.notes: Skipped — machine taken. Already hit lat pulldown (same pull pattern).

actual_exercises.name: Core Block
actual_exercises.notes: 3 full rounds supersetted. Legs felt heavy during leg raises (Monday soreness). Pushed through all 3 rounds.

strength.hrr_note: Transitioned straight into core — no recovery window

period.notes: On Tyblume (combined OC). No intensity adjustments per rules.

flags: Lat pulldown grip variable — different bar made 75lb feel easier. Retest at 65 with regular bar before locking in.
Period started day 24 — medium flow, cramps not yet.
notes: Split session: elliptical AM solo, strength PM with bf. Three progression attempts: chest press 45→50 (confirmed), tricep dip 15→20 (confirmed), lat pulldown 60→75 (unconfirmed — grip variable). OHP still the grinder at 20lb. Period started.
